name: bee-dev
description: Spec-driven development workflow plugins for Claude Code — includes the Bee Hive live dashboard with live agent activity feed for browsing phases, reports, hook events, and workflow state in a readable web UI

plugins.name: bee
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow with review gates, the Bee Hive local dashboard, and a live agent activity feed powered by Claude Code hooks — take features from idea to commit and watch tool calls stream in real time

plugins.name: nectar
plugins.description: The essence of spec-driven development distilled into 8 pure skills — shape, plan, build, review, debug, audit, capture, resume. No commands, no state machine, no ceremony: plain artifacts in docs/work/ are the only state.
